summary: Full frontend testing of Sonja's 16th birthday landing page. All major features tested on 390px mobile viewport. App is working well with minor scroll offset note on BEGIN AGAIN.

integration_issues.issue: Scrolls to scrollY=459 instead of 0. Hero section IS visible (correct experience), but technically not top of page. Password gate sits above so scrollY=0 would show password gate. This may be intentional.

action_items: Verify BEGIN AGAIN scroll target is intentional (scrolls to hero section at ~459px, not page top which would show password gate)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pure frontend landing page. Password gate, hero, 9-photo timeline, world section, boarding pass gift section, and closing section all render correctly. Audio player (MUSIC button) is visible. All content verified via page text dump.

features_verified.hero_section: PASS - HAPPY BIRTHDAY, Sonja, 16 years old, BEGIN THE JOURNEY all present
features_verified.photo_timeline_9_photos: PASS - 9 entries with year labels (2009-2025) and captions
features_verified.world_section: PASS - city dots (London, Paris, NYC, etc.), 3 quotes visible
features_verified.boarding_pass: PASS - ZELIKMAN AIRLINES, SONJA, CHILDHOOD→EVERYTHING, ZL-16, FIRST CLASS, GATE: OPEN, WINDOW, Destination: Unknown
features_verified.gift_message: PASS - 'Happy Birthday Sonja – 16 years old', 'Not for things that fade', 'Pappa & Mamma'
features_verified.closing_section: PASS - 'There is a whole world beyond what you see right now', 'Happy 16th, Sonja.'
features_verified.audio_player: PASS - MUSIC floating button visible bottom-right
features_verified.begin_again_button: PARTIAL - scrolls back to hero section (scrollY~459), not absolute top (password gate). Hero is visible which is correct experience
features_verified.mobile_viewport_390px: PASS - all content readable and properly laid out
